description_long: This object is a collection of ornate, vintage-style street lamps, each featuring multiple lantern-shaped glass enclosures supported by intricately detailed metal posts. The set includes tall, multi-headed lamp posts, a single-head post, wall-mounted lanterns, and a hanging pendant lamp, all sharing a consistent Victorian-inspired design. The lamp posts have robust, flared bases and decorative finials atop each lantern, with the glass sections encased in dark, wrought-iron-like metalwork. The lanterns themselves are frosted or opal glass, diffusing the light and adding to the classic aesthetic. The wall and ceiling-mounted variants have matching decorative brackets and chains, maintaining the cohesive style. These lamps are typically found in upscale urban environments, parks, or historical districts, providing both illumination and ornamental value.
description: A set of ornate, vintage-style street lamps with multiple lantern heads, decorative metalwork, and frosted glass, including post, wall, and pendant variants.
description_view_0: This view shows the full set of lamps, highlighting the variety of mounting styles and the ornate, multi-headed design of the tallest lamp posts.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the front of a tall, triple-headed lamp post, emphasizing the detailed metalwork and glass lanterns.
description_view_2: This view displays the lamps from the opposite side, again showing the full set and the symmetry of the multi-headed posts.
description_view_3: This view presents a direct side profile of the tallest lamp post, showcasing the alignment and spacing of the lantern heads and the decorative base.
